$comment: Per-repo /auto configuration. Committed to the repo and read at runtime from
.github/auto/auto.config.json (AUTO_CONFIG_PATH in lib/constants.sh).
EVERY value here is OPTIONAL and overrides a built-in default from
lib/constants.sh; omit a key to keep its default. This file MUST NOT contain
secrets or tokens (gitleaks scans it). 'schemaVersion' must equal
AUTO_SCHEMA_VERSION (currently 1).
Hard, non-overridable invariants are NOT configurable here and are intentionally
absent: base branch is always develop-auto, force-push is always forbidden,
Co-Authored-By is always rejected, squash is the merge method, and the green
floor (non-empty required-check set) is always enforced.

account.$comment: OPTIONAL pin for the expected gh login. Default (empty) = the engine follows whatever account is ACTIVE in the installing user's local gh CLI — the normal mode. When set, preflight hard-asserts the active login matches and aborts otherwise; the engine never runs `gh auth switch` itself.

rounds.$comment: Per-size review-round overrides. Each is capped at the hard ceiling 5 (AUTO_ROUNDS_CEILING) regardless of this value. Defaults: S=1, M=2, L=3, XL=3.

escalations.$comment: Run-wide ceiling on escalation chains; overrides MAX_ESCALATIONS=5. The run hard-stops when exceeded.

$comment: Fast buildable-per-commit gate run by bin/build-check.sh before finalizing
each commit (NOT the authoritative PR CI). 'enabled':false skips it with a WARN.
'commands' (a non-empty array) FULLY REPLACES auto-detection — each runs in
order and any non-zero exit rejects the commit. Omit (or leave empty) to use
built-in ecosystem auto-detection: node (package.json) -> python (pytest) ->
go (go.mod) -> make (Makefile with a 'check' target). Keep these FAST — seconds.
CI-parity controls (ci-parity-check.sh). Workflows whose FIRST LINE is the
exclusionMarker are auto-infrastructure and ignored on BOTH branches (the
exclusion set must be symmetric across develop and develop-auto).
excludeWorkflows lists basenames excluded in addition to the marker.

checks.$comment: CI auto-merge polling/flaky budget. Override CHECK_POLL_INTERVAL=30, CHECK_POLL_TIMEOUT=3600, FLAKY_RETRY_MAX=2.

lease.$comment: Per-issue lease TTL/heartbeat. Override AUTO_LEASE_TTL=1800, AUTO_LEASE_HEARTBEAT=900 (seconds).
